description: Make claude-super-setup the best autonomous app builder — premium design system, enforcing hooks, visual verification, self-healing pipeline

tasks.title: Create premium-builder skill
tasks.description: Write skills/premium-builder/SKILL.md — comprehensive component pattern library covering typography scale, spacing scale, visual effects (glass-card, gradients, shadows, noise), animation library (SSR-safe), and 10+ component patterns (cards, buttons, navbars, heroes, features, pricing, footers, auth forms, terminals, integrations). This is the design law that all generated apps must follow.
acceptance: skills/premium-builder/SKILL.md exists with 10+ component patterns each having code examples
Typography scale covers Display through Caption with exact Tailwind classes
Animation library includes SSR-safe rules (initial={false} for above-fold)
Visual effects section includes glass-card, gradients, shadows, noise, grid patterns with CSS code

tasks.title: Create OKLCH palette generator script
tasks.description: Write scripts/generate-palette.sh that takes a hex color input and outputs complete CSS custom properties for both :root (light) and .dark themes. Generates 11-shade primary scale, neutral scale with brand tint, and all 14 semantic token mappings. Uses Node.js for OKLCH math.
acceptance: scripts/generate-palette.sh '#3ECF8E' outputs valid CSS with :root and .dark blocks
Output includes 11-shade primary scale (50-950) in OKLCH
Output includes neutral scale with subtle brand hue tint
All 14 semantic tokens mapped (background, foreground, card, primary, muted, border, etc.)
Script is executable and handles invalid input gracefully

tasks.title: Create design-compliance hook
tasks.description: Write hooks/design-compliance.sh — PreToolUse hook that blocks writes containing hardcoded hex colors (#xxx), arbitrary pixel values, or inline color styles in .tsx and .css files. Allows hex values only in design token definition files (globals.css :root block).
acceptance: hooks/design-compliance.sh blocks a file containing 'color: #3b82f6' (exits non-zero)
hooks/design-compliance.sh passes a file using 'text-primary' or 'var(--primary)'
Allows hex values inside globals.css :root and .dark blocks (token definitions)
Allows hex values in comments and string literals
Hook registered in settings.json as PreToolUse on Write/Edit for *.tsx, *.css

tasks.title: Create SSR safety check hook
tasks.description: Write hooks/ssr-safety-check.sh — PostToolUse hook that warns when Framer Motion initial={{ opacity: 0 }} is used without whileInView, or when above-fold components use opacity-hiding initial states. Checks for noscript fallback in layout.
acceptance: hooks/ssr-safety-check.sh warns on 'initial={{ opacity: 0' in .tsx files
Does NOT warn on 'initial={false}' (the correct pattern)
Checks for noscript style fallback in layout.tsx
Hook registered in settings.json as PostToolUse on Write/Edit for *.tsx

tasks.title: Create dead-link check hook
tasks.description: Write hooks/dead-link-check.sh — PostToolUse hook that scans written .tsx files for href='#' or href='' links and warns. Also checks for empty onClick handlers on anchor tags.
acceptance: hooks/dead-link-check.sh warns on href='#' in .tsx files
hooks/dead-link-check.sh warns on href='' (empty string) in .tsx files
Does NOT warn on href='/#section' (anchor links with path)
Hook registered in settings.json as PostToolUse on Write/Edit for *.tsx

tasks.title: Create typecheck-on-save hook
tasks.description: Write hooks/typecheck-on-save.sh — PostToolUse hook that runs tsc --noEmit on the project after TypeScript file writes. Captures and reports errors with file:line format.
acceptance: hooks/typecheck-on-save.sh runs tsc --noEmit and exits non-zero on type errors
Error output includes file path and line number
Runs only for .ts and .tsx file writes (not .md, .json, etc.)
Completes within 10 seconds for typical projects
Hook registered in settings.json as PostToolUse on Write/Edit for *.ts, *.tsx

tasks.title: Enhance web-shadcn-v4 template with premium defaults
tasks.description: Update config/stacks/web-shadcn-v4.yaml to include premium component set: glass-card CSS utility, gradient-text utility, product-shadow, hero-glow, noise texture, marquee animation, cursor-blink. Add these to the template's globals.css scaffold section.
acceptance: web-shadcn-v4.yaml includes premium CSS utilities in its globals.css scaffold
Template includes glass-card, gradient-text, product-shadow, hero-glow utilities
Template includes marquee and cursor-blink keyframe animations
Template references premium-builder skill in its conventions section

tasks.title: Register all new hooks in settings.json
tasks.description: Add all 4 new hooks (design-compliance, ssr-safety-check, dead-link-check, typecheck-on-save) to the Claude Code settings.json hooks configuration. Ensure they have correct event types, matchers, and action_on_fail settings.
acceptance: All 4 hooks are listed in settings.json under the hooks array
design-compliance is PreToolUse with action block
ssr-safety-check is PostToolUse with action warn
dead-link-check is PostToolUse with action warn
typecheck-on-save is PostToolUse with action warn
Existing hooks are preserved (not overwritten)

tasks.title: Enhance /clone-app with source repo discovery and visual scoring
tasks.description: Update commands/clone-app.md to add Phase 1.3 (template/source repo discovery via WebSearch), Phase 5 visual comparison scoring with VisualComparisonResult JSON output, and auto-fix iteration loop (3 rounds). Add similarity score to the clone report.
acceptance: clone-app.md includes Step 1.3: Template Discovery with WebSearch for source repos
clone-app.md Phase 5 includes visual comparison scoring outputting JSON
clone-app.md Phase 5 includes fix iteration loop with max 3 rounds
Clone report includes 'Visual accuracy: ~XX%' line

tasks.title: Enhance /new-app with palette generation and premium defaults
tasks.description: Update commands/new-app.md to call generate-palette.sh when user provides a brand color, apply premium CSS utilities from the premium-builder skill, and include standard E2E smoke test in every new project.
acceptance: new-app.md includes step to ask for brand color and run generate-palette.sh
new-app.md includes step to add premium CSS utilities to globals.css
new-app.md includes step to generate standard E2E smoke test
new-app.md references premium-builder skill for component generation

tasks.title: Create standard E2E smoke test generator
tasks.description: Write commands/generate-tests.md enhancement or a new utility that generates a standard Playwright E2E smoke test for any project. Tests: all pages load, no console errors, responsive at 390px, all links valid, accessibility basics.
acceptance: Generated E2E test checks all pages load with content
Generated test checks no console errors on any page
Generated test checks responsive at 390px (no horizontal scroll)
Generated test checks all links have valid href (no '#')
Test template is reusable across all project types

tasks.title: Integration verification — test full pipeline
tasks.description: Run /new-app with the enhanced pipeline to verify: palette generation works, premium CSS utilities are included, hooks fire correctly, E2E tests are generated. Create a test project, verify all acceptance criteria from M1, and clean up.
acceptance: A test project generated with /new-app includes OKLCH design tokens
Hooks fire correctly: design-compliance blocks hardcoded hex
Generated project has premium CSS utilities (glass-card, gradient-text)
Generated project has standard E2E smoke test
All existing commands still work (no regressions)
